title: anthoxanthum pallidum
intro: Anthoxanthum pallidum, also known as false oat grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum pallidum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
